items.title: Animated dropdown interaction contract
steps: Run cd frontend && npm test -- src/components/pm/AnimatedSelect.test.tsx.
Run cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit.
Run cd frontend && npm run build.
items.expected: Pointer and keyboard selection, focus, dismissal, disabled state, ARIA state, generic values, TypeScript, and production build all pass.
items.evidence: 2026-07-16: AnimatedSelect.test.tsx passed 5/5; TypeScript passed; Vite production build passed.
items.notes: The full frontend suite passed 151/155. Four unchanged rankingsDashboard.utils.test.ts assertions failed and are unrelated to this PM patch.

items.title: Backlog project and priority dropdowns
items.precondition: Authenticated admin session with Project Management backlog data.
steps: Open /admin/pm?view=backlog at desktop width.
Open the project dropdown and select a project.
Open the priority dropdown and select a priority.
Repeat at a narrow viewport and toggle Overdue and Unassigned.
items.expected: Both menus animate, remain unclipped, show the current choice, and preserve project, priority, Overdue, and Unassigned filtering.

items.title: Assignee user and task filters
items.precondition: Authenticated admin session with at least two PM users and assigned tasks.
steps: Open /admin/pm?view=assignee&userId={id}.
Switch the main assignee dropdown to another user.
Change the project and priority dropdowns.
Toggle Overdue and switch 7d, 4w, and 3m ranges.
Open /admin/pm?view=me and confirm the signed-in user still resolves.
items.expected: All three menus animate and remain unclipped; assignee IDs remain numeric; URL, filters, Overdue, and range controls retain their behavior.

items.title: Task Detail assignee regression
items.precondition: Authenticated admin session with a PM task that can be opened.
steps: Open a task detail panel.
Open Assigned To and choose another assignee.
Close and reopen the dropdown.
items.expected: The shared animated dropdown opens, selects, closes, restores focus, and displays the current assignee.

items.title: PM notification and option-list scrollbars
items.precondition: Authenticated PM view with enough notifications and dropdown options to overflow.
steps: Open /admin/pm?view=me and scroll the Notifications card.
Open a dropdown with enough options to scroll.
Hover both scrollbar thumbs and inspect content spacing.
items.expected: Scrollbars are thin with transparent tracks, use PM theme colors, become clearer on hover, and do not cover row or option content.

items.title: Theme, focus, and reduced-motion behavior
items.precondition: Ability to switch PM light/dark themes and emulate prefers-reduced-motion.
steps: Inspect each changed dropdown in PM dark theme and light theme.
Use Tab and arrow keys and confirm the focus ring and highlighted option remain visible.
Enable reduced motion and reopen each dropdown.
items.expected: Text and focus remain readable in both themes, and reduced motion removes nonessential animation without hiding open/closed state changes.

items.title: Alloro Docs parity check
steps: Search Alloro Docs for Project Management, PM dashboard, Global Backlog, and Assignee View documentation surfaces.
Confirm unrelated existing docs edits remain untouched.
items.expected: No matching PM documentation surface exists, so this UI polish requires no docs change.
items.evidence: 2026-07-16: repository search returned no matching PM documentation surface; existing PracticeHubReplica.tsx and practice-hub.ts edits were left untouched.
